entries.key: {{r|A loud buzz is emitted. The unauthorized glyph flashes on the display.}}
entries.text: {{r|大きなブザー音が鳴った。認証されていないグリフがディスプレイに点滅した。}}

entries.key: You touch =subject.t= and recall =pronouns.possessive= passcode. =pronouns.Subjective= =verb:beep:afterpronoun= warmly.

entries.key: A loud buzz is emitted. The unauthorized glyph flashes on the display.
entries.text: 大きなブザー音が鳴った。認証されていないグリフがディスプレイに点滅した。

entries.key: =subject.T= =verb:bat= =subject.possessive= banded wings and blows the =gas= away!

entries.key: =object.Does:are= much too old and rusted to enter.
entries.text: =object.name=は古すぎて錆びついており、中に入ることはできない。

entries.key: =subject.Name's= =object.name= =object.verb:burst= outward, destroying =objpronouns.reflexive= to prevent potentially lethal damage.
entries.text: =subject.name=の=object.name=が外側に破裂し、致命的なダメージを防ぐために=objpronouns.reflexive=を破壊した。

entries.key: =subject.Name's= =object.name= =object.verb:burst= outward, destroying =objpronouns.reflexive= to prevent catastrophic damage.
entries.text: =subject.name=の=object.name=が外側に破裂し、壊滅的なダメージを防ぐために=objpronouns.reflexive=を破壊した。
=subject.name=の結晶の外殻がフラクタル状に割れた！

entries.key: =subject.T= =verb:extrude= through the mirror of =pronouns.possessive= crystalline rind!
entries.text: =subject.T=が=pronouns.possessive=結晶の外殻の鏡面を通り抜けた！
=subject.T=が=object.t=によろめき入った！

entries.key: The crystalline eggs of =subject.t= swell and pop!
entries.text: =subject.t=の結晶の卵が膨らみ、弾けた！
=subject.T=が二つに分裂した！
=subject.T=が時空の繭に入った！
